class.name: IffPdu
class.comment: FastDIS local patch: restore DIS 7 IFF PDU class from commented upstream XML so generation can treat it as a schema-backed row. Evidence: references/open-dis/DIS7.xml contains a commented IFF layer-1 definition around pduType 28, while the supporting record types remain present.

attribute.name: emittingEntityId
attribute.comment: ID of the entity that is the source of the emissions

attribute.name: eventID
attribute.comment: Number generated by the issuing simulation to associate related events.

attribute.name: location
attribute.comment: Location with respect to the entity.
